EUOOHA.Q_UPDATE_DATE	,
EUOOHA.ACTION_CODE	,
EUOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME	
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL EUOOHA  
WHERE 
EUOOHA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SUOOHA
WHERE EUOOHA.HEADER_ID=SUOOHA.HEADER_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
						EUOOHA.HEADER_ID
		ORDER BY EUOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SUOOHA.	Q_UPDATE_DATE	,
SUOOHA.	ACTION_CODE	,
SUOOHA.	CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE	
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SUOOHA  
WHERE 
			NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
						WHERE SUOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
			OR
			NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
						WHERE SUOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
			OR
			NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
						WHERE	SUOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID=ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
               					WHERE SUOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	 
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_BILL
               					WHERE SUOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
   							WHERE SUOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT)

(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SBOOHA
WHERE EBOOHA.HEADER_ID=SBOOHA.HEADER_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EBOOHA.HEADER_ID ORDER BY EBOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SBOOHA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME	,
SBOOHA.	CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME	,
SBOOHA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ	,
SBOOHA.	QUEUE_ID	,
SBOOHA.	PROCESS_SET_ID	,
SBOOHA.	Q_CREATION_DATE	,
SBOOHA.	Q_UPDATE_DATE	,
SBOOHA.	ACTION_CODE	,
SBOOHA.	CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE	
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SBOOHA  
WHERE 
			NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
						WHERE SBOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
			OR
			NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
						WHERE SBOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')
			OR
			NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
						WHERE	SBOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID=ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID AND ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
               					WHERE SBOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	 
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_BILL
               					WHERE SBOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
   							WHERE SBOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
				STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
				STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
STHDR_BK.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
STHDR_BK.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
 -999 AS SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
 NULL  AS SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
 'UNK' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 					BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SUOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER						ORDER_NUMBER,
SUOOHA.HEADER_ID 	SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE	
FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SUOOHA  
		INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
			ON( SUOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
		 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
						ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') )  STHDR_BK,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT ) SMHDR_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT SSO 
	WHERE 	SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
			SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
			SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  
	(SELECT 
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 					BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		EUOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER						ORDER_NUMBER
	FROM  
		$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL EUOOHA  
			INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
				ON( EUOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
	)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
			EXCEP_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
			EXCEP_BK.ORDER_NUMBER=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
				STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
				STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
STHDR_BK.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
STHDR_BK.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
 -999 AS SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
 NULL AS SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
 'UNK' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 					BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SBOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER						ORDER_NUMBER,
SBOOHA.HEADER_ID 	SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE	
FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SBOOHA  
		INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
			ON( SBOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
		 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
						ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO') )  STHDR_BK,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT ) SMHDR_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_NRT SSO 
	WHERE 	SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
			SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
			SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  
	(SELECT 
		EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 					BK_COMPANY_CODE,
		EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY			BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		EBOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER						ORDER_NUMBER
	FROM  		$$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL EBOOHA  
			INNER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
				ON( EBOOHA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  
	)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE =STHDR_BK.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AND
			EXCEP_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=STHDR_BK.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AND
			EXCEP_BK.ORDER_NUMBER=STHDR_BK.ORDER_NUMBER)
